fields.description: The minimum overall length of the passcode. This value is independent of the value for `minComplexChars`.

fields.title: Require Alphabetic Value
fields.description: If `true`, the system requires alphabetic characters instead of only numeric characters.

fields.title: Passcode History
fields.description: This value defines _N_, where the new passcode must be unique within the last _N_ entries in the passcode history.

fields.title: Grace Period for Device Lock
fields.description: The maximum grace period, in minutes, to unlock the phone without entering a passcode. The default is `0`, which is no grace period and requires a passcode immediately. On macOS, the system translates this grace period value to screen-saver settings.

fields.title: MinutesUntilFailedLoginReset
fields.description: The number of minutes before the system resets the login after the maximum number of unsuccessful login attempts is reached. This key requires setting `maxFailedAttempts`. Available in macOS 10.10 and later.

fields.title: ChangeAtNextAuth
fields.description: If `true`, the system causes a password reset to occur the next time the user tries to authenticate. If this key is set in a device profile, the setting takes effect for all users, and admin authentications may fail until the admin user password is also reset. Available in macOS 10.13 and later.

fields.title: CustomRegex
fields.description:
Specifies a regular expression, and its description, used to enforce password compliance. Use the simpler passcode restrictions whenever possible, and rely on regular expression matching only when necessary. Mistakes in regular expressions can lead to frustrating user experiences, such as unsatisfiable passcode policies, or policy descriptions that don't match the enforced policy.

Available in macOS 14 and later.

entries.title: Printing
entries.description: The payload that configures printers.

fields.title: RequireAdminToAddPrinters
fields.description: If `true`, requires an administrator password to add printers.

fields.title: AllowLocalPrinters
fields.description: If `true`, allows printers that connect directly to a user's computer.

fields.title: RequireAdminToPrintLocally
fields.description: If `true`, requires an administrator password to print locally.

fields.title: ShowOnlyManagedPrinters
fields.description: If `true`, shows only managed printers.

fields.title: PrintFooter
fields.description: If `true`, prints the page footer (including the user name and date).

fields.title: PrintMACAddress
fields.description: If `true`, includes the MAC address.

fields.title: FooterFontSize
fields.description: The footer font size.

fields.title: FooterFontName
fields.description: The footer font name.

fields.title: DefaultPrinter
fields.description: The default printer for the user.

fields.title: UserPrinterList
fields.description: The printers available to a user.

entries.title: Privacy Preferences Policy Control
entries.description: The payload that configures privacy preferences.

notes: Requires user-approved MDM on at least one platform.

fields.title: Services
fields.description: A dictionary whose keys are limited to the privacy policy control services.  In the case of conflicting specifications, the most restrictive setting (deny) is used.

entries.title: Profile Removal Password
entries.description: The payload that configures profile removal.

notes: Requires supervised devices on at least one platform.

fields.title: Removal Password
fields.description: The password to allow removing the profile.

entries.title: Relay
entries.description: The payload that configures relay settings.

fields.title: Relays
fields.description: An array of dictionaries that describe one or more relay servers that the system can chain together.

fields.title: Match Domains
fields.description:
A list of domain strings that the system uses to determine which connection to route through the servers in `Relays`.

Any connection that matches a domain in the list exactly or is a subdomain of the listed domain uses the relay servers, unless it matches a domain in `ExcludedDomains`.

If this list and `MatchFQDNs` are empty, the system routes traffic to all domains to the relay servers, except those that match an excluded domain or excluded FQDN.

fields.title: Excluded Domains
fields.description: A list of domain strings to exclude from routing through the servers in `Relays`. Any connection that matches a domain in the list exactly or is a subdomain of the listed domain won't use the relay server.

fields.title: Match FQDNs
fields.description: A list of Fully Qualified Domain Names (FQDNs) to be routed through the servers contained in `Relays`. Any connection that matches an FQDN in the list exactly uses the relay servers. If this list and `MatchDomains` are empty, the system routes traffic to all domains to the relay servers, except those that match an excluded domain or excluded FQDN.

fields.title: Excluded FQDNs
fields.description: A list of Fully Qualified Domain Names (FQDNs) to exclude from routing through the servers contained in `Relays`. Any connection that matches an FQDN in the list exactly won't use the relay server. When `MatchDomains` is also present, any FQDN listed in the list should be a subdomain of at least one `MatchDomain` value, otherwise it will not have any effect.

fields.title: RelayUUID
fields.description: A globally unique identifier for this relay configuration. The system uses this UUID to route managed apps through the servers in `Relays`. This key is required for user enrollment.

fields.title: UI Toggle Enabled
fields.description: If `true`, the device allows the user to disable this network relay configuration.

fields.title: Allow DNS Failover
fields.description: If `true`, the device allows the relay to failover to the default system DNS resolver.

entries.title: Restrictions
entries.description: The payload that configures restrictions on a device.

fields.title: AllowAccountModification
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables modification of accounts, such as Apple Accounts, and internet-based accounts, such as Mail, Contacts, and Calendar.

fields.title: Allow Handoff
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables activity continuation. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices and with Managed Apple Accounts is deprecated. In a future release, this restriction will begin requiring supervision and will apply to personal Apple Accounts only.

fields.title: Allow Adding Game Center Friends
fields.description: If `false`, the system prohibits adding friends to Game Center. Requires a supervised device in iOS 13 and later.

fields.title: AllowAirDrop
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables AirDrop.

fields.title: Allow incoming AirPlay requests
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables incoming AirPlay requests.

fields.title: Allow AirPrint
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables AirPrint.

fields.title: Allow storage of AirPrint credentials in Keychain
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Keychain storage of user name and password for AirPrint.

fields.title: Allow discovery of AirPrint printers using iBeacons
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables iBeacon discovery of AirPrint printers, which prevents spurious AirPrint Bluetooth beacons from phishing for network traffic.

fields.title: Allow Modifying Cellular Data Usage for Apps Settings
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables changing settings for cellular data usage for apps.

fields.title: Allow App Clips
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents a user from adding any App Clips, and removes any existing App Clips on the device.

fields.title: Allow App Installation
fields.description:
If `false`, the system disables the App Store and removes its icon from the Home Screen. Users are unable to install or update their apps. This applies to App Store apps, marketplace apps, and locally installed apps (using Configurator, Xcode, and so forth).

In iOS 10 and later, MDM commands can override this restriction. Requires a supervised device in iOS 13 and later.

fields.title: Allow Apple Intelligence Report
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Apple Intelligence reports.

fields.title: AllowApplePersonalizedAdvertising
fields.description: If `false`, the system limits Apple personalized advertising.

fields.title: Allow App Removal
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables removal of apps from an iOS device. This applies to App Store apps, marketplace apps, and locally installed apps (using Configurator, Xcode, and so forth).

fields.title: Allow Hiding Apps
fields.description: If `false`, disables the ability for the user to hide apps. It doesn't affect the user's ability to leave it in the App Library, while removing it from the Home Screen.

fields.title: Allow Locking Apps
fields.description: If `false`, disables the ability for the user to lock apps. Because hiding apps also requires locking them, disallowing locking also disallows hiding.

fields.title: Allow modifying Remote Management Sharing setting
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents modifying the Remote Management Sharing setting in System Settings.

fields.title: Allow Siri
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Siri.

fields.title: AllowAssistantUserGeneratedContent
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents Siri from querying user-generated content from the web.

fields.title: Allow Siri While Locked
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Siri when the device is locked. The system ignores this restriction if the device doesn't have a passcode set.

fields.title: Allow Auto Correction
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables keyboard autocorrection.

fields.title: Allow Auto Dim
fields.description: If `false`, disables auto dim on iPads with OLED displays.

fields.title: Allow Automatic App Downloads
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents automatic downloading of apps purchased on other devices. This setting doesn't affect updates to existing apps.

fields.title: AllowAutomaticScreenSaver
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Apple TV's automatic screen saver.

fields.title: AllowAutoUnlock
fields.description: If `false`, the system disallows auto unlock. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

fields.title: Allow modifying Bluetooth settings
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents modification of Bluetooth settings.

fields.title: Allow modifying Bluetooth Sharing setting
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents modifying Bluetooth settings in System Settings.

fields.title: Allow Bookstore
fields.description: If `false`, the system removes the Book Store tab from the Books app.

fields.title: Allow Bookstore Erotica
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents the user from downloading Apple Books media that's tagged as erotica. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

fields.title: Allow Call Recording
fields.description: If `false`, disables call recording.

fields.title: Allow Camera Use
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the camera and removes its icon from the Home Screen, and users are unable to take photographs. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

fields.title: AllowCellularPlanModification
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents users from changing settings related to their cellular plan (available only on select carriers).

fields.title: Allow use of iMessage
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the use of iMessage with supervised devices. If the device supports text messaging, the user can still send and receive text messages.

fields.title: AllowCloudAddressBook
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables iCloud Contacts services.

fields.title: Allow iCloud Backup
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables backing up the device to iCloud. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

fields.title: AllowCloudBookmarks
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables iCloud Bookmark sync.

fields.title: AllowCloudCalendar
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables iCloud Calendar services.

fields.title: AllowCloudDesktopAndDocuments
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables iCloud Desktop and Document services.

fields.title: Allow iCloud Document Sync
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables document and key-value syncing to iCloud. Requires a supervised device in iOS 13 and later, and Shared iPad doesn't support it. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices and with Managed Apple Accounts is deprecated.

fields.title: AllowCloudFreeform
fields.description: If `false`, the system disallows iCloud Freeform services.

fields.title: AllowCloudKeychainSync
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables iCloud Keychain synchronization. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices and with Managed Apple Accounts is deprecated.

fields.title: AllowCloudMail
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables iCloud Mail services.

fields.title: AllowCloudNotes
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables iCloud Notes services.

fields.title: Allow iCloud Photo Library
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables iCloud Photo Library. The system removes any photos from local storage that aren't fully downloaded from iCloud Photo Library to the device. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices and with Managed Apple Accounts is deprecated.

fields.title: AllowCloudPrivateRelay
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables iCloud Private Relay. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices and with Managed Apple Accounts is deprecated.

fields.title: AllowCloudReminders
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables iCloud Reminder services.

fields.title: AllowContentCaching
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables content caching. This restriction is not supported on the user channel.

fields.title: Allow Continuous Path Keyboard
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables QuickPath keyboard.

fields.title: Allow default browser modification
fields.description: If `false`, disables default browser preference modification. The MDM Settings command to set the default browser preference still works when applying this.

fields.title: Allow default calling app modification
fields.description: If `false`, disables default calling app preference modification. The MDM Settings command to set the default calling app preference still works when applying this.

fields.title: Allow default messaging app modification
fields.description: If `false`, disables default messaging app preference modification. The MDM Settings command to set the default messaging app preference still works when applying this.

fields.title: Allow Define
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables definition lookup.

fields.title: Allow Modifying Device Name
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents the user from changing the device name.

fields.title: Allow Device Sleep
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents the device from automatically sleeping.

fields.title: Allow diagnostic submission
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents the device from automatically submitting diagnostic reports to Apple.

fields.title: Allow modifying diagnostics settings
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables changing the diagnostic submission and app analytics settings in the Diagnostics & Usage UI in Settings.

fields.title: Allow dictation
fields.description: If `false`, the system disallows dictation input.

fields.title: Allowed Exceptions to Camera Restriction
fields.description: If present, the system exempts apps with bundle IDs in the array from the `allowCamera` restriction. The system doesn't grant these apps access to the camera automatically; they're only exempted from the `allowCamera` restriction. This key has no effect when the camera isn't restricted. Multiple payloads combine using an intersect operation. Requires a supervised device.

fields.title: Allowed External Intelligence Workspace IDs
fields.description: An array of strings, but currently restricted to a single element. If present, Apple Intelligence allows use of only the given external integration workspace ID, and requires a sign-in to make requests. The user is required to sign in to integrations that support signing in. Multiple payloads combine using an intersect operation. This means the allowed set of workspace IDs can become the empty set if multiple payloads specify conflicting values.

fields.title: Allow Configuring Restrictions or ScreenTime
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the Enable Restrictions option in the Restrictions UI in Settings. If `false` in iOS 12 and later, the system disables the Enable ScreenTime option in the ScreenTime UI in Settings and disables ScreenTime if already enabled.

fields.title: Allow Trusting Enterprise Apps
fields.description: If `false`, the system removes the Trust Enterprise Developer button in Settings > General > VPN & Device Management, which prevents provisioning apps by universal provisioning profiles. This restriction applies to free developer accounts and enterprise app developers that aren't implicitly trusted by apps that install through MDM. This restriction doesn't revoke previously granted trust.

fields.title: Allow Enterprise Books Backup
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables backup of Enterprise books.

fields.title: Allow Enterprise Books Notes and Highlights Sync
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables sync of Enterprise books, notes, and highlights.

fields.title: Allow Erase All Content and Settings
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the Erase All Content and Settings option in the Reset UI.

fields.title: Allow eSIM Modification
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables modifications of eSIMs.

fields.title: Allow eSIM Outgoing Transfers
fields.description: If `false`, prevents the transfer of an eSIM from the device on which the restriction is installed to a different device.

fields.title: Allow Explicit Content
fields.description:
If `false`, the system hides explicit music or video content purchased from the iTunes Store. The system marks explicit content as such by content providers, such as record labels, when sold through the iTunes Store. Explicit content in the News and Podcast apps is also hidden.

Requires a supervised device in iOS 13 and later. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

fields.title: Allow external intelligence integrations
fields.description: If `false`, disables the use of external, cloud-based intelligence services with Siri. In iOS, this restriction is temporarily allowed on unsupervised and user enrollments. In a future release, this restriction will require supervision, and will be ignored on unsupervised devices.

fields.title: Allow external intelligence integrations sign-in
fields.description: If `false`, forces external intelligence providers into anonymous mode. If a user is already signed in to an external intelligence provider, applying this restriction signs them out when attempting the next request.

fields.title: Allow modifying File Sharing setting
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents modifying File Sharing setting in System Settings.

fields.title: AllowFilesNetworkDriveAccess
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents connecting to network drives in the Files app.

fields.title: AllowFilesUSBDriveAccess
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents connecting to any connected USB devices in the Files app.

fields.title: AllowFindMyDevice
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Find My Device in the Find My app.

fields.title: AllowFindMyFriends
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Find My Friends in the Find My app.

fields.title: AllowFindMyFriendsModification
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables changes to Find My Friends.

fields.title: Allow Touch ID to Unlock Device
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents Touch ID, Face ID, or Optic ID from unlocking a device. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

fields.title: Allow Modifying Touch ID Fingerprints
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents the user from modifying Touch ID or Face ID.

fields.title: Allow Game Center
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Game Center, and the system removes its icon from the Home Screen.

fields.title: Allow Genmoji
fields.description: If `false`, prohibits creating new Genmoji.

fields.title: Allow Automatic Sync While Roaming
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables global background fetch activity when an iOS phone is roaming. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

fields.title: AllowHostPairing
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables host pairing with the exception of the supervision host. If there's no configured supervision host certificate, the system disables all pairing. Host pairing lets the administrator control whether an iOS device can pair with a host Mac or PC.

fields.title: Allow Image Playground
fields.description: If `false`, prohibits the use of image generation.

fields.title: Allow Image Wand
fields.description: If `false`, prohibits the use of Image Wand.

fields.title: Allow In App Purchases
fields.description: If `false`, the system prohibits in-app purchasing. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

fields.title: Allow modifying Internet Sharing setting
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents modifying the Internet Sharing setting in System Settings.

fields.title: Allow iPhone mirroring
fields.description: If `false`, prohibits the use of iPhone Mirroring. In macOS, this prevents the Mac from mirroring any iPhone. In iOS, this prevents the iPhone from mirroring to any Mac.

fields.title: Allow iPhone widget on Mac
fields.description: If `false`, the system disallows iPhone widgets on a Mac that signs in with the same Apple Account for iCloud.

fields.title: Allow use of iTunes
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the iTunes Music Store and removes its icon from the Home Screen. Users can't preview, purchase, or download content. Requires a supervised device in iOS 13 and later.

fields.title: AllowiTunesFileSharing
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables iTunes file sharing services.

fields.title: Allow Keyboard Shortcuts
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables keyboard shortcuts.

fields.title: Allow Listed Apps
fields.description: If present, the system only shows or can launch apps with bundle IDs in the array. Include the value `com.apple.webapp` to allow all webclips. This applies to App Store apps, marketplace apps, and locally installed apps (using Configurator, Xcode, and so forth).

fields.title: Allow Live Voicemail
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables live voicemail on the device.

fields.title: Allow creating users in System Settings
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents creating users in System Settings.

fields.title: AllowLockScreenControlCenter
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents Control Center from appearing on the Lock Screen.

fields.title: AllowLockScreenNotificationsView
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the Notifications history view on the Lock Screen, so users can't view past notifications. However, they can still see notifications when they arrive.

fields.title: AllowLockScreenTodayView
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the Today view in Notification Center on the Lock Screen.

fields.title: AllowMailPrivacyProtection
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Mail Privacy Protection on the device.

fields.title: AllowMailSmartReplies
fields.description: If `false`, disables smart replies in Mail.

fields.title: AllowMailSummary
fields.description: If `false`, disables the ability to create summaries of email messages manually. This doesn't affect automatic summary generation.

fields.title: Allow iCloud Sync for Managed Apps
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents managed apps from using iCloud sync.

fields.title: Allow managed apps to write to managed contacts accounts
fields.description:
If `true`, the system allows managed apps to write contacts to unmanaged accounts. If `allowOpenFromManagedToUnmanaged` is `true`, this restriction has no effect.

> Important:
> Use MDM to install profiles that contain this restriction.

fields.title: Allow App Installation from alternative marketplaces
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents installation of alternative marketplace apps from the web and prevents any installed alternative marketplace apps from installing apps.

fields.title: Allow modifying Media Sharing setting
fields.description: If `false`, prevents modification of Media Sharing settings.

fields.title: Allow Multiplayer Gaming
fields.description: If `false`, the system prohibits multiplayer gaming.

fields.title: Allow Apple Music
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the Music service, and the Music app reverts to classic mode.

fields.title: Allow use of News
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables News.

fields.title: AllowNFC
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables NFC.

fields.title: AllowNotesTranscription
fields.description: If `false`, disables transcription in Notes.

fields.title: AllowNotesTranscriptionSummary
fields.description: If `false`, disables transcription summarization in Notes.

fields.title: Allow Modifying Notifications Settings
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables modification of notification settings.

fields.title: Enable allow open from managed to unmanaged
fields.description: If `false`, documents in managed apps and accounts open only in other managed apps and accounts.

fields.title: Enable allow open from unmanaged to managed
fields.description: If `false`, documents in unmanaged apps and accounts open only in other unmanaged apps and accounts.

fields.title: AllowOTAPKIUpdates
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables over-the-air PKI updates. Setting this restriction to `false` doesn't disable CRL and OCSP checks.

fields.title: Allow Pairing With Apple Watch
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables pairing with an Apple Watch, and the system unpairs any currently paired Apple Watch and erases its content.

fields.title: Allow Wallet While Locked
fields.description: If `false`, the system hides Passbook notifications from the Lock Screen.

fields.title: Allow Modifying Passcode
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents adding, changing, or removing the passcode. The system ignores this restriction on Shared iPad.

fields.title: AllowPasswordAutoFill
fields.description:
If `false`, the system disables:

- The AutoFill Passwords feature in iOS, with Keychain and third-party password managers
- Prompting the user to use a saved password in Safari or in apps
- Automatic strong passwords
- Suggesting strong passwords to users

However, if `false`, the system doesn't prevent AutoFill for contact info and credit cards in Safari.

fields.title: AllowPasswordProximityRequests
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables requesting passwords from nearby devices.

fields.title: AllowPasswordSharing
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables sharing passwords with the AirDrop passwords feature, or with the Passwords app.

fields.title: Allow modifying Personal Hotspot settings
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables modifications of the personal hotspot setting.

fields.title: Allow personalized handwriting results
fields.description: If false, prevents the system from generating text in the user's handwriting.

fields.title: Allow Photo Stream
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Photo Stream.

fields.title: AllowPodcasts
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables podcasts.

fields.title: Allow Predictive Keyboard
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables predictive keyboards.

fields.title: Allow modifying Printer Sharing setting
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents modifying Printer Sharing settings in System Settings.

fields.title: AllowProximitySetupToNewDevice
fields.description: If `false`, disables the prompt to set up new devices that are nearby. Starting with iOS 26.3, this also prevents exporting iOS data to set up new Android devices.

fields.title: Allow iTunes Radio
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Apple Music Radio.

fields.title: Allow Background Security Improvement Installation
fields.description: If `false`, the system prohibits installation of Background Security Improvements.

fields.title: Allow Background Security Improvement Removal
fields.description: If `false`, the system prohibits removal of Background Security Improvements.

fields.title: AllowRCSMessaging
fields.description: If `false`, prevents the use of RCS messaging.

fields.title: Allow modifying Remote Apple Events Sharing setting
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents modifying Remote Apple Events Sharing settings in System Settings.

fields.title: Allow pairing with Remote app
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables pairing Apple TV for use with the Control Center widget.

fields.title: Allow Remote Screen Observation
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables remote screen observation by the Classroom app. Nest this key beneath `allowScreenShot` as a subrestriction. If `allowScreenShot` is `false`, the Classroom app doesn't observe remote screens. Requires a supervised device until iOS 13 and macOS 10.15. Allowed for user enrollments in macOS 12 and later.

fields.title: AllowRosettaUsageAwareness
fields.description: If `false`, disables Rosetta usage awareness. When Rosetta usage awareness is active, a pop-up dialog is displayed to the user when an app that is using Rosetta is launched. The pop-up dialog indicates that Rosetta will be removed in a future version of the operating system so that the user can contact the app vendor regarding a replacement for the current app.

fields.title: Allow use of Safari
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the Safari web browser app, and the system removes its icon from the Home Screen. This setting also prevents users from opening web clips. Requires a supervised device in iOS 13 and later.

fields.title: AllowSafariHistoryClearing
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the ability to clear browsing history in Safari.

fields.title: AllowSafariPrivateBrowsing
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the ability to use private browsing in Safari.

fields.title: AllowSafariSummary
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the ability to summarize content in Safari.

fields.title: Allow use of satellite connectivity
fields.description: If `false`, the system prohibits the connection to and use of satellite services.

fields.title: Allow Screenshots and Screen Recording
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables saving a screenshot of the display and capturing a screen recording. It also disables the Classroom app from observing remote screens.

fields.title: AllowSharedDeviceTemporarySession
fields.description: If `false`, the system makes temporary sessions unavailable on Shared iPad.

fields.title: Allow Shared Stream
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Shared Photo Stream. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

fields.title: Allow Spell Check
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the keyboard spell checker.

fields.title: Allow Siri Suggestions
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Spotlight Internet search results in Siri Suggestions. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

fields.title: Allow modifying Startup Disk settings
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents modification of Startup Disk settings in System Settings.

fields.title: AllowSystemAppRemoval
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables the removal of system apps from the device.

fields.title: Allow modifying Time Machine settings
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents modification of Time Machine settings in System Settings. This restriction is not supported on the user channel.

fields.title: Allow App Installation from App Store
fields.description:
If `false`, the system disables the App Store and removes its icon from the Home Screen. However, users can continue to install or update their apps either locally (via Configurator, Xcode, and so forth), or using alternative marketplace apps.

In iOS 10 and later, MDM commands can override this restriction.

fields.title: Allow UI Configuration Profile Installation
fields.description: If `false`, the system prohibits the user from installing configuration profiles and certificates interactively.

fields.title: Allow Universal Control
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables Universal Control.

fields.title: Allow unmanaged apps to read managed contacts accounts
fields.description:
If `true`, the system allows unmanaged apps to read from managed contacts accounts. If `allowOpenFromManagedToUnmanaged` is `true`, this restriction has no effect.

> Important:
> Use MDM to install profiles that contain this restriction.

fields.title: AllowUnpairedExternalBootToRecovery
fields.description: If `true`, the system allows unpaired devices to boot devices into recovery.

fields.title: Allow user to accept untrusted TLS certificates
fields.description: If `false`, the system automatically rejects untrusted HTTPS certificates without prompting the user.

fields.title: AllowUSBRestrictedMode
fields.description: If `false`, the system allows iOS devices to always connect to USB accessories while locked. In macOS, allows new USB and Thunderbolt accessories, and SD cards to connect without authorization. If the system has Lockdown mode enabled, it ignores this value. This restriction is not supported on the user channel.

fields.title: Allow Video Conferencing
fields.description: If `false`, the system hides the FaceTime app. Requires a supervised device in iOS 13 and later.

fields.title: Allow Video Conferencing Remote Control
fields.description: If `false`, disables the ability for a remote FaceTime session to request control of the device.

fields.title: Allow Visual Intelligence Summary
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables visual intelligence summarization.

fields.title: Allow Voice Dialing While Device is Locked
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables voice dialing if the device is locked with a passcode.

fields.title: Allow Adding VPN Configurations (Supervised devices only)
fields.description: If `false`, the system allows only managed apps to create VPN configurations. Prior to iOS 18, the system also allows unmanaged apps to create VPN configurations.

fields.title: Allow Modifying Wallpaper
fields.description: If `false`, the system prevents changing the wallpaper.

fields.title: Allow App Installation from web sites
fields.description: If `false`, the device prevents installation of apps directly from the web.

fields.title: Allow writing tools
fields.description: If `false`, disables Apple Intelligence writing tools.

fields.title: AutonomousSingleAppModePermittedAppIDs
fields.description: If present, the system allows apps identified by the bundle IDs listed in the array to autonomously enter Single App Mode.

fields.title: Blacklisted Apps
fields.description: Use `blockedAppBundleIDs` instead.

fields.title: Blocked Apps
fields.description:
If present, the system prevents showing or launching apps with bundle IDs in the array. Include the value `com.apple.webapp` to restrict all webclips. This applies to App Store apps, marketplace apps, and locally installed apps (using Configurator, Xcode, and so forth).

> Note:
> Denying system apps may disable other functionality. For example, denying the App Store app may prevent users from accepting the terms and conditions for the user-based Volume Purchase Program (VPP).

fields.title: DeniedICCIDsForiMessageFaceTime
fields.description: An array of strings representing ICCIDs of cellular plans. The device prevents use of any matching cellular networks in iMessage and FaceTime. The array must contain no more than 4 ICCID strings.

fields.title: DeniedICCIDsForRCS
fields.description: An array of strings representing ICCIDs of cellular plans. The device prevents use of any matching cellular networks with RCS messaging. The array must contain no more than 4 ICCID strings.

fields.title: EnforcedFingerprintTimeout
fields.description: The value, in seconds, after which the fingerprint unlock requires a password to authenticate. The default value is 48 hours.

fields.title: EnforcedSoftwareUpdateDelay
fields.description: How many days to delay a software update on the device. With this restriction in place, the user doesn't see a software update until the specified number of days after the software update release date. The restrictions `forceDelayedAppSoftwareUpdates` and `forceDelayedSoftwareUpdates` use this value.

fields.title: EnforcedSoftwareUpdateMajorOSDeferredInstallDelay
fields.description: This restriction allows the administrator to set the number of days to delay a major software upgrade on the device. When this restriction is in place, the user sees a software upgrade only after the specified delay after the release of the software upgrade. This value controls the delay for `forceDelayedMajorSoftwareUpdates`.

fields.title: EnforcedSoftwareUpdateMinorOSDeferredInstallDelay
fields.description: This restriction allows the administrator to set the number of days to delay a minor OS software update on the device. When this restriction is in place, the user sees a software update only after the specified delay after the release of the software update. This value controls the delay for `forceDelayedSoftwareUpdates`.

fields.title: EnforcedSoftwareUpdateNonOSDeferredInstallDelay
fields.description: This restriction allows the administrator to set the number of days to delay an app software update on the device. When this restriction is in place, the user sees a non-OS software update only after the specified delay after the release of the software. This value controls the delay for `forceDelayedAppSoftwareUpdates`.

fields.title: Treat AirDrop as Unmanaged Destination
fields.description: If `true`, the system considers AirDrop to be an unmanaged drop target.

fields.title: ForceAirPlayIncomingRequestsPairingPassword
fields.description: If `true`, the system forces all devices sending AirPlay requests to this device to use a pairing password. This key isn't supported in tvOS 10.2 and later. Use the AirPlay Security Payload instead.

fields.title: ForceAirPlayOutgoingRequestsPairingPassword
fields.description: If `true`, the system forces all devices receiving AirPlay requests from this device to use a pairing password.

fields.title: Disallow AirPrint to destinations with untrusted certificates
fields.description: If `true`, the system requires trusted certificates for TLS printing communication.

fields.title: Enable Siri Profanity Filter
fields.description: If `true`, the system forces the use of the profanity filter for Siri and dictation. Requires a supervised device in iOS.

fields.title: ForceAuthenticationBeforeAutoFill
fields.description: If `true`, the user needs to authenticate before the system can autofill passwords or credit card information in Safari and apps. If this restriction isn't enforced, the user can toggle this feature in Settings. Only supported on devices with Face ID or Touch ID.

fields.title: ForceAutomaticDateAndTime
fields.description: If `true`, the system enables the Set Automatically feature in Date & Time and the user can't disable it. The system updates the device's time zone only when the device can determine its location using a cellular connection or Wi-Fi with location services enabled.

fields.title: ForceBypassScreenCaptureAlert
fields.description: If `true`, then the system bypasses the presentation of a screen capture alert.

fields.title: ForceClassroomAutomaticallyJoinClasses
fields.description: If `true`, the system automatically gives permission to the teacher's requests without prompting the student.

fields.title: ForceClassroomRequestPermissionToLeaveClasses
fields.description: If `true`, a student enrolled in an unmanaged course through Classroom needs to request permission from the teacher to leave the course.

fields.title: ForceClassroomUnpromptedAppAndDeviceLock
fields.description: If `true`, the system allows the teacher to lock apps or the device without prompting the student.

fields.title: ForceClassroomUnpromptedScreenObservation
fields.description: If `true` and `ScreenObservationPermissionModificationAllowed` is also `true` in the Education payload, a student enrolled in a managed course through the Classroom app automatically gives permission to that course teacher's requests to observe the student's screen without prompting the student.

fields.title: ForceDelayedAppSoftwareUpdates
fields.description: If `true`, the system delays user visibility of non-OS software updates. Control visibility of operating system updates through `forceDelayedSoftwareUpdates`. The delay is 30 days unless you set `enforcedSoftwareUpdateDelay` to another value.

fields.title: ForceDelayedMajorSoftwareUpdates
fields.description: If `true`, the system delays user visibility of major OS updates.

fields.title: ForceDelayedSoftwareUpdates
fields.description: If `true`, the system delays user visibility of software updates. In macOS, the system allows seed build updates without delay. The delay is 30 days unless you set `enforcedSoftwareUpdateDelay` to another value.

fields.title: Force Encrypted Backups
fields.description: If `true`, the system encrypts all backups.

fields.title: Require iTunes password for all purchases
fields.description: If `true`, the system forces the user to enter their iTunes password for each transaction.

fields.title: ForceLimitAdTracking
fields.description: If `true`, the system limits ad tracking. Additionally, it disables app tracking and the Allow Apps to Request to Track setting.

fields.title: ForceOnDeviceOnlyDictation
fields.description: If `true`, the system disables connections to Siri servers for the purposes of dictation.

fields.title: ForceOnDeviceOnlyTranslation
fields.description: If `true`, the device can't connect to Siri servers for the purposes of translation.

fields.title: Force Preserve ESIM on Erase
fields.description:
If `true`, the system preserves eSIM when it erases the device due to too many failed password attempts or the Erase All Content and Settings option in Settings > General > Reset.

> Note:
> The system doesn't preserve eSIM if Find My initiates erasing the device.

fields.title: Force Apple Watch Wrist Detection
fields.description: If `true`, the system forces a paired Apple Watch to use Wrist Detection.

fields.title: Disallow Wi-Fi from being turned off
fields.description: If `true`, the system prevents turning off Wi-Fi in Settings or Control Center, even by entering or leaving Airplane Mode. It doesn't prevent selecting which Wi-Fi network to use. and later.

fields.title: ForceWiFiToAllowedNetworksOnly
fields.description: If `true`, the system limits the device to only join Wi-Fi networks set up through a configuration profile.

fields.title: Only join Wi-Fi networks installed by profiles
fields.description: Use `forceWiFiToAllowedNetworksOnly` instead.

fields.title: Apps Ranking Number
fields.description:
The maximum level of app content allowed on the device. Starting with iOS 26.2, this rating may apply to certain system apps.

Age bands and the number of discrete age values vary by region, but the values are consistent across regions. For example, in a region that defines rating level 14+, its value is guaranteed to be larger than 300 (12+) and smaller than 600 (17+). Also, the value of rating level 15+ is guaranteed to be larger than the assigned value of rating level 14+. For more information about age ratings, see [Age ratings values and definitions](https://developer.apple.com/help/app-store-connect/reference/age-ratings-values-and-definitions).

Below is the complete list of age rating values used across all App Store regions.
- `1000`: All
- `621`: 21+
- `620`: 20+
- `619`: 19+
- `618`: 18+
- `600`: 17+
- `416`: 16+
- `415`: 15+
- `314`: 14+
- `313`: 13+
- `300`: 12+
- `211`: 11+
- `210`: 10+
- `200`: 9+
- `108`: 8+
- `107`: 7+
- `106`: 6+
- `105`: 5+
- `100`: 4+
- `3`: 3+
- `2`: 2+
- `1`: 1+
- `0`: None

This restriction will require supervision in a future release.

fields.title: Apps Exempted from Rating Restrictions
fields.description: If present, the system exempts apps with bundle IDs in the array from age-based rating restrictions. The system uses intersection combine rules to combine multiple payloads and any exceptions that parental control apps provide, including ScreenTime.

fields.title: Movies Ranking Number
fields.description:
The maximum level of movie content allowed on the device. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

Possible values, with the U.S. description of the rating level:

- `1000`: All
- `500`: NC-17
- `400`: R
- `300`: PG-13
- `200`: PG
- `100`: G
- `0`: None

fields.title: Region Code
fields.description: The two-letter key that profile tools use to display the proper ratings for the given region. The client doesn't recognize or report this data.

fields.title: TV Shows Ranking Number
fields.description:
The maximum level of TV content allowed on the device. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

Possible values, with the U.S. description of the rating level:

- `1000`: All
- `600`: TV-MA
- `500`: TV-14
- `400`: TV-PG
- `300`: TV-G
- `200`: TV-Y7
- `100`: TV-Y
- `0`: None

fields.title: RequireManagedPasteboard
fields.description: If `true`, copy-and-paste functionality is limited by the `allowOpenFromManagedToUnmanaged` and `allowOpenFromUnmanagedToManaged` restrictions.

fields.title: Accept Cookies in Safari
fields.description:
Defines the conditions under which the device accepts cookies. The user-facing settings changed in iOS 11, although the possible values remain the same. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated. Allowed values:

- `0`: Enables Prevent Cross-Site Tracking and Block All Cookies, and the user canʼt disable either setting.
- `1` or `1.5`: Enables Prevent Cross-Site Tracking, and the user canʼt disable it. Doesn't enable Block All Cookies, but the user can enable it.
- `2`: Enables Prevent Cross-Site Tracking, but doesn't enable Block All Cookies. The user can toggle either setting.

fields.title: Allow AutoFill in Safari
fields.description:
If `false`, the system disables Safari AutoFill for passwords, contact info, and credit cards, and also prevents using the Keychain for AutoFill. Requires a supervised device in iOS 13 and later.

> Note:
> The system still allows third-party password managers, and apps can use AutoFill.

fields.title: Allow JavaScript
fields.description: If `false`, Safari doesn't execute JavaScript. This restriction will require supervision in a future release.

fields.title: Allow Pop-ups
fields.description: If `false`, Safari doesn't allow pop-up windows. Support for this restriction on unsupervised devices is deprecated.

fields.title: Enable Fraud Warning
fields.description: If `true`, the system enables Safari fraud warning.

fields.title: Whitelisted Apps
fields.description: Use `allowListedAppBundleIDs` instead.

entries.title: SCEP
entries.description: The payload that configures Simple Certificate Enrollment Protocol (SCEP) settings.

fields.title: Payload Content
fields.description: A dictionary containing the SCEP information.

entries.title: Screensaver
entries.description: The payload that configures the screen saver.

fields.title: AskForPassword
fields.description: If `true`, the user is prompted for a password when the screen saver is unlocked or stopped. When you use this prompt, you must also provide `askForPasswordDelay`. Available in macOS 10.13 and later.

fields.title: AskForPasswordDelay
fields.description: The number of seconds to delay before the password will be required to unlock or stop the screen saver (the grace period). A value of `2147483647` (for example, `0x7FFFFFFF`) disables this requirement. To use this option, you must set `askForPassword` to `true`. Available in macOS 10.13 and later.

fields.title: IdleTime
fields.description: The number of seconds of inactivity before the screen saver activates (0 = Never activate).

fields.title: LoginWindowModulePath
fields.description: The full path to the screen-saver module to use.

fields.title: ModuleName
fields.description: The name of the screen saver module.

entries.title: Screensaver User
entries.description: The payload that configures a user's screen saver settings.

fields.title: ModuleName
fields.description: The name of the screen saver module.

fields.title: ModulePath
fields.description: A full path to the screen saver module to use.

fields.title: IdleTime
fields.description: The number of seconds of inactivity before the screen saver activates (`0` = Never activate).

entries.title: Security Preferences
entries.description: The payload that configures security preferences.

fields.title: DontAllowPasswordResetUI
fields.description: If `true`, disables user changes to the password.

fields.title: DontAllowLockMessageUI
fields.description: If `true`, disables user changes to the lock message.

fields.title: DontAllowFireWallUI
fields.description: If `true`, disables user changes to the firewall settings.

entries.title: Service Management - Managed Login Items
entries.description: This payload that configures managed login items, which auto-enables and auto-allows matched items.

notes: Requires user-approved MDM on at least one platform.

fields.title: Rules
fields.description: An array of service management rules.

entries.title: Setup Assistant
entries.description: The payload that configures Setup Assistant settings.

notes: Requires supervised devices on at least one platform.

fields.title: SkipCloudSetup
fields.description: If `true`, the system skips the Apple Account setup pane.

fields.title: SkipSiriSetup
fields.description: If `true`, the system skips the Siri setup pane.

fields.title: SkipPrivacySetup
fields.description: If `true`, the system skips the Privacy consent pane.

fields.title: SkipiCloudStorageSetup
fields.description: If `true`, the system skips the iCloud Storage pane.

fields.title: SkipTrueTone
fields.description: If `true`, the system skips the True Tone Display pane.

fields.title: SkipAppearance
fields.description: If `true`, the system skips the Choose Your Look pane.

fields.title: SkipTouchIDSetup
fields.description: If `true`, the system skips the Touch ID setup pane.

fields.title: SkipScreenTime
fields.description: If `true`, the system skips the Screen Time pane.

fields.title: SkipAccessibility
fields.description: If `true`, the system skips the Accessibility pane.

fields.title: SkipSetupItems
fields.description: An array of strings that describe the setup items to skip. `SkipKeys` provides a list of valid strings and their meanings. Available in iOS 14 and later, and macOS 15 and later.

fields.title: SkipUnlockWithWatch
fields.description: If `true`, the system skips the Unlock With Apple Watch pane.

fields.title: SkipWallpaper
fields.description: If 'true', the system skips the Wallpaper selection window.

entries.title: ShareKit
entries.description: The payload that configures ShareKit.

fields.title: SHKAllowedShareServices
fields.description: The list of plugin IDs that show up in the user's Share menu. If this array exists, only these items are permitted.

fields.title: SHKDeniedShareServices
fields.description: The list of plugin IDs that won't show up in the user's Share menu. This key is used only if there is no `SHKAllowedShareServices` key.

entries.title: Single Sign-On
entries.description: The payload that configures single sign-on (SSO).

fields.title: Name
fields.description: The human-readable name for the account.

fields.title: Kerberos
fields.description: The Kerberos dictionary.

entries.title: SmartCard
entries.description: The payload that configures a smart card.

fields.title: UserPairing
fields.description: If `false`, users don't get the pairing dialog, although existing pairings still work.

fields.title: AllowSmartCard
fields.description: If `false`, the system disables smart cards for logins, authorizations, and screen saver unlocking. It is still allowed for other functions, such as signing emails and accessing the web. A restart is required for a setting change to take effect.

fields.title: CheckCertificateTrust
fields.description:
Configures the certificate trust check and has one of the following possible values:

- `0`: Turns off certificate trust check.
- `1`: Turns on certificate trust check. A standard validity check is performed but doesn't include additional revocation checks.
- `2`: Turns on certificate trust check. A soft revocation check is also performed. Until the certificate is explicitly rejected by CRL/OCSP, it's considered valid. This setting means that unavailable or unreachable CRL/OCSP allow this check to succeed.
- `3`: Turns on certificate trust check. A hard revocation check is also performed. Unless CRL/OCSP explicitly says "This certificate is OK," it's considered invalid. This option is the most secure.

fields.title: OneCardPerUser
fields.description: If `true`, a user can pair with only one smart card, although existing pairings are allowed if already set up.

fields.title: TokenRemovalAction
fields.description: If `1`, the system enables the screen saver when the smart card is removed. Available in macOS 10.13.4 and later.

fields.title: EnforceSmartCard
fields.description: If `true`, a user can only log in or authenticate with a smart card. Available in macOS 10.13.2 and later.

entries.title: Software Update
entries.description: The payload that configures the software update policy.

fields.title: CatalogURL
fields.description: The URL of the software update catalog. This property is not supported in macOS 11 and later.

fields.title: Allow Pre-Release Update Installation
fields.description: If `true`, prerelease software can be installed on this computer.

fields.title: Restrict Software Update Require Admin To Install
fields.description: If `true`, restrict app installations to admin users. This key has the same function as the  `restrict-store-require-admin-to-install` key in the `com.apple.appstore` payload.

fields.title: AutomaticallyInstallMacOSUpdates
fields.description: If `false`, restricts the "Install macOS Updates" option and prevents the user from changing the option.

fields.title: AutomaticallyInstallAppUpdates
fields.description: If `false`, deselects the "Install app updates from the App Store" option and prevents the user from changing the option.

fields.title: AutomaticCheckEnabled
fields.description: If `false`, deselects the "Check for updates" option and prevents the user from changing the option.

fields.title: AutomaticDownload
fields.description: If `false`, deselects the "Download new updates when available from the App Store" option and prevents the user from changing the option.

fields.title: CriticalUpdateInstall
fields.description: If `false`, disables the automatic installation of critical updates and prevents the user from changing the "Install system data files and security updates" option.

fields.title: ConfigDataInstall
fields.description: If `false`, restricts the automatic installation of configuration data.

entries.title: Subscribed Calendars
entries.description: The payload that configures subscribed calendars.

fields.title: Description
fields.description: The description of the account.

fields.title: URL
fields.description: The server's address.

fields.title: Username
fields.description: The user's user name.

fields.title: Password
fields.description: The user's password.

fields.title: Use SSL
fields.description: If `true`, the system enables SSL.

fields.title: VPNUUID
fields.description: The VPNUUID of the per-app VPN the account uses for network communication. Available in iOS 14 and later.

entries.title: System Extensions
entries.description: The payload that configures system extensions.

notes: Requires user-approved MDM on at least one platform.

fields.title: AllowUserOverrides
fields.description: If `false`, restricts users from approving additional system extensions that configuration profiles don't explicitly allow.

fields.title: AllowedTeamIdentifiers
fields.description:
An array of team identifiers that defines valid, signed system extensions that are allowable to load. Approved system extensions are those signed with any of the specified team identifiers.

To avoid requiring an administrator to authorize the operation, you can activate system extensions that this key specifies using `OSSystemExtensionActivationRequest API`.

It's an error for the same team identifier to appear in both this array and as a key in the `AllowedSystemExtensions` dictionary.

fields.title: AllowedSystemExtensionTypes
fields.description:
A dictionary that maps a team identifier to an array of strings, where each string is a type of system extension that you can install for that team identifier. The allowed extension types are `DriverExtension`, `NetworkExtension`, and `EndpointSecurityExtension`.

If there's no entry for a specified team identifier in the dictionary, the system allows all extension types.

fields.title: AllowedSystemExtensions
fields.description:
A dictionary of approved system extensions on the computer. The dictionary maps the team identifiers (keys) to arrays of bundle identifiers, where the bundle identifier defines the system extension to install.

To avoid requiring an administrator to authorize the operation, you can activate system extensions that this key specifies using `OSSystemExtensionActivationRequest API`.

It's an error for the same team identifier to appear in both the `AllowedTeamIdentifiers` array and as a key in this dictionary.

fields.title: RemovableSystemExtensions
fields.description:
A dictionary of system extensions that are allowed to remove themselves from the machine. The dictionary maps team identifiers (keys) to arrays of bundle identifiers, where the bundle identifier defines the system extension. An application using the `OSSystemExtensionDeactivationRequest` API can deactivate the specified system extensions without requiring an administrator to authorize the operation.

Available in macOS 12 and later.

fields.title: NonRemovableSystemExtensions
fields.description: A dictionary of system extensions on the computer. The dictionary maps the team identifiers (keys) to arrays of bundle identifiers, where the bundle identifier defines the system extension which can't be disabled or uninstalled when SIP is enabled. It's an error for the same mapping to appear in the dictionary values corresponding to `RemovableSystemExtensions` and `NonRemovableSystemExtensions` keys.

fields.title: NonRemovableFromUISystemExtensions
fields.description: A dictionary of system extensions on the computer. The dictionary maps the team identifiers (keys) to arrays of bundle identifiers, where the bundle identifier defines the system extension which can't be disabled or uninstalled from System Settings or Finder. The set of system extensions between `RemovableSystemExtensions` and `NonRemovableFromUISystemExtensions` can to overlap.

entries.title: System Logging
entries.description: The payload that configures system logging.

fields.title: Processes
fields.description: Not to be used.

fields.title: Subsystems
fields.description: A dictionary enabling the logging level for subsystems. See `Customizing Logging Behavior While Debugging` for more details about the format of the dictionary.

fields.title: System
fields.description: This dictionary has one key, `Enable-Private-Data`. Setting that value to `true` enables private data logging for the entire system.

entries.title: System Migration
entries.description: The payload that configures system migration.

fields.title: CustomBehavior
fields.description: The list of custom behavior dictionaries.

entries.title: System Policy - Kernel Extensions
entries.description: The payload that configures the kernel extension policies.

notes: Requires user-approved MDM on at least one platform.

fields.title: AllowNonAdminUserApprovals
fields.description:
If `true`, nonadministrative users can approve additional kernel extensions in the Security & Privacy preferences.

Available in macOS 11 and later.

fields.title: AllowUserOverrides
fields.description: If `true`, users can approve additional kernel extensions that configuration profiles don't explicitly allow.

fields.title: AllowedTeamIdentifiers
fields.description: The array of team identifiers that define which validly signed kernel extensions can load.

fields.title: AllowedKernelExtensions
fields.description: The dictionary that represents a set of kernel extensions that the system always allows to load on the computer. The dictionary maps team identifiers (keys) to arrays of bundle identifiers.

entries.title: System Policy Control
entries.description: The payload that configures the system policy for assessments.

fields.title: EnableAssessment
fields.description: If `true`, enables Gatekeeper. If `false`, disables Gatekeeper.

fields.title: AllowIdentifiedDevelopers
fields.description:
If `true`, enables Gatekeeper's "Mac App Store and identified developers" option.

If `false`, enables Gatekeeper's "Mac App Store" option.

If the value of `EnableAssessment` isn't set to `true`, this key has no effect.

fields.title: EnableXProtectMalwareUpload
fields.description: If `false`, prevents Gatekeeper from prompting the user to upload blocked malware to Apple for purposes of improving malware detection.

entries.title: System Policy Managed
entries.description: The payload that configures the Finder's contextual menu to bypass the system policy.

fields.title: DisableOverride
fields.description: If `true`, disables the Finder's contextual menu item.

entries.title: System Policy Rule
entries.description: The payload that configures the system policy.

fields.title: Requirement
fields.description: The policy requirement. This key must follow the syntax described in [Code Signing Requirement Language](https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/Security/Conceptual/CodeSigningGuide/RequirementLang/RequirementLang.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40005929-CH5).

fields.title: Comment
fields.description: This string appears in the System Policy UI. If it's missing, `PayloadDisplayName` or `PayloadDescription` is entered into this field before the rule is added to the System Policy database.

fields.title: Priority
fields.description: The rule's priority.

fields.title: Expiration
fields.description: The expiration date for rules being processed.

fields.title: OperationType
fields.description: The type of operation.

fields.title: LeafCertificate
fields.description: The single leaf certificate for the app that is in the allow list.

entries.title: System Preferences
entries.description: The payload that configures the preference panes.

fields.title: EnabledPreferencePanes
fields.description: The list of enabled System Preferences panes.

fields.title: DisabledPreferencePanes
fields.description: The list of disabled System Preferences panes.

fields.title: DisabledSystemSettings
fields.description:
The list of disabled System Settings extensions. All other items will be enabled. When `DisabledSystemSettings` is specified, the device ignores `DisabledPreferencePanes` and `EnabledPreferencePanes`.

> Note:
> A given System Settings extension can supply more than one section in System Settings; disabling such an extension disables all sections it supplies.

entries.title: Time Machine
entries.description: The payload that configures Time Machine.

fields.title: AutoBackup
fields.description: If `true`, performs automatic backups at regular intervals.

fields.title: BackupAllVolumes
fields.description: If `true`, backs up only the startup volume by default.

fields.title: BackupDestURL
fields.description: The URL of the backup destination.

fields.title: BackupSizeMB
fields.description: The backup size limit, in megabytes. Set to 0 for unlimited.

fields.title: BackupSkipSys
fields.description: If `true`, skips system files and folders by default.

fields.title: MobileBackups
fields.description: If `true`, create local backup snapshots when not connected to the network.

fields.title: BasePaths
fields.description: The list of paths to back up besides the startup volume.

fields.title: SkipPaths
fields.description: The path to skip from start volume.

entries.title: Time Server
entries.description: The payload that configures the time server.

fields.title: TimeServer
fields.description: The NTP server to connect to. In macOS 10.13 and later, only one time server is supported.

fields.title: TimeZone
fields.description: The time zone path location string in `/usr/share/zoneinfo/`; for example, `America/Denver` or `Zulu`.

entries.title: TV Remote
entries.description: The payload that configures the Apple TV remote.

notes: Requires supervised devices on at least one platform.

fields.title: AllowedRemotes
fields.description: The array of valid devices that Apple TV can connect to.

fields.title: AllowedTVs
fields.description: The array of valid Apple TV identifiers that the remote can connect to.

entries.title: User Preferences
entries.description: The payload that configures iCloud password preferences.

fields.title: DisableUsingiCloudPassword
fields.description: If `true`, disables the iCloud password for local accounts.

entries.title: VPN
entries.description: The payload that configures a VPN.

fields.title: Type
fields.description:
The type of the VPN, which defines which settings are appropriate for this VPN payload.

If the type is `VPN` or `TransparentProxy`, then the system requires a value for `VPNSubType`.

`TransparentProxy` is only available in macOS. `L2TP` and `IPSec` aren't available in tvOS. `AlwaysOn` is only available on iOS and Apple Watch pairing isn't supported with `AlwaysOn`. For a previously paired Apple Watch, all phone-watch communications cease when `AlwaysOn` is enabled. Not available in watchOS.

fields.title: VPN Subtype
fields.description:
An identifier for a vendor-specified configuration dictionary when the value for `VPNType` is `VPN`.

If `VPNType` is `VPN`, the system requires this field. If the configuration targets a VPN solution that uses a VPN plugin, then this field contains the bundle identifier of the plugin. Here are some examples:

- Cisco AnyConnect: `com.cisco.anyconnect.applevpn.plugin`
- Juniper SSL: `net.juniper.sslvpn`
- F5 SSL: `com.f5.F5-Edge-Client.vpnplugin`
- SonicWALL Mobile Connect: `com.sonicwall.SonicWALL-SSLVPN.vpnplugin`
- ``Aruba VIA: `com.arubanetworks.aruba-via.vpnplugin`

If the configuration targets a VPN solution that uses a network extension provider, then this field contains the bundle identifier of the app that contains the provider. Contact the VPN solution vendor for the value of the identifier.

If `VPNType` is `IKEv2`, then the `VPNSubType` field is optional and reserved for future use. If it's specified, it needs to contain an empty string.

Not available in watchOS.

fields.title: User Defined Name
fields.description: The description of the VPN connection that the system displays on the device. Not available in watchOS.

fields.title: Vendor Configuration Dictionary
fields.description: The vendor-specific configuration dictionary, which the system reads only when `VPNSubType` has a value. Not available in watchOS.

fields.title: VPN
fields.description: The dictionary to use when `VPNType` is `VPN`.

fields.title: IPv4 Settings
fields.description: The dictionary that contains IPv4 settings. Not available in watchOS.

fields.title: PPP
fields.description: The dictionary to use when `VPNType` is `L2TP` or `PTPP`. Not available in watchOS.

fields.title: IPSec Settings
fields.description: The dictionary that contains IPSec settings. Not available in watchOS.

fields.title: IKEv2
fields.description: The dictionary to use when `VPNType` is `IKEv2`.

fields.title: DNS
fields.description: A dictionary to use for all VPN types.

fields.title: Proxies
fields.description: The dictionary to use to configure `Proxies` for use with `VPN`.

fields.title: AlwaysOn
fields.description: The dictionary to use when `VPNType` is `AlwaysOn`. Not available in tvOS or watchOS.

fields.title: TransparentProxy
fields.description: The dictionary to use when `VPNType` is `TransparentProxy`. Available in macOS 14 and later.

entries.title: Web Clip
entries.description: The profile that configures web clips on the device.

fields.title: Precomposed Icon
fields.description: If `true`, the system prevents SpringBoard from adding shine to the icon.

fields.title: Full Screen
fields.description: If `true`, the system launches the web clip as a full-screen web app.

fields.title: URL
fields.description: The URL of the web clip.

fields.title: Icon
fields.description: The PNG icon to show on the Home Screen. If not set, the system displays a white square. For best results, provide a square image that's no larger than 400 x 400 pixels and less than 1 MB when uncompressed. The graphics file is automatically scaled and cropped to fit, if necessary, and converted to PNG format. Web clip icons are 144 x 144 pixels for iPad devices with a Retina display, and 114 x 114 pixels for iPhone devices. To prevent the device from adding a shine to the image, set `Precomposed` to `true`.

fields.title: Removable
fields.description: If `true`, the system enables removing the web clip.

fields.title: Label
fields.description: The name of the web clip that the system displays on the Home Screen.

fields.title: Ignore Web Clip manifest scope
fields.description: If `true`, a full screen web clip can navigate to an external web site without showing Safari UI. Otherwise, Safari UI appears when navigating away from the web clip's URL. This key has no effect when `FullScreen` is `false`. Available in iOS 14 and later.

fields.title: Target Application Bundle Identifier
fields.description: The application bundle identifier of the application that opens the URL. To use this property, install the profile through MDM. Available in iOS 14 and later.

entries.title: Web Content Filter
entries.description: The payload that configures web content filters.

fields.title: FilterType
fields.description: The type of filter, built-in or plug-in. In macOS, the system only supports the plug-in value.

fields.title: SafariHistoryRetentionEnabled
fields.description: If `true`, this payload enforces a policy which requires retention of browsing history. This causes Safari to disable clearing of browsing history, and prevents the use of private browsing mode because that mode doesn't keep browsing history.

fields.title: Web filter enabled
fields.description: If `true`, the system enables automatic filtering. Use when `FilterType` is `BuiltIn`.

fields.title: PermittedURLs
fields.description: An array or URLs that are accessible whether or not the automatic filter allows access. Use when `FilterType` is `BuiltIn`. Requires that `AutoFilterEnabled` is `true`.

fields.title: BlacklistedURLs
fields.description: Use `DenyListURLs` instead.

fields.title: DenyListURLs
fields.description: An array of URLs that are inaccessible. Use when `FilterType` is `BuiltIn`. Limit the number of these URLs to no more than 500.

fields.title: HideDenyListURLs
fields.description: If `true`, the device hides the `DenyListURLs` item in the profiles that display in Settings > General > VPN & Device Management.

fields.title: White list
fields.description: Use `AllowListBookmarks` instead.

fields.title: Allow list
fields.description: An array of dictionaries that define the pages that the user can bookmark or visit. Use when `FilterType` is `BuiltIn`.

fields.title: UserDefinedName
fields.description: The display name for this filtering configuration. Required when `FilterType` is `Plugin`.

fields.title: PluginBundleID
fields.description: The bundle ID of the plug-in that provides filtering service. Required when `FilterType` is `Plugin`. Otherwise, it ignores this value. Consult your filtering solution vendor to determine what to specify for this value. Required when `FilterType` is `Plugin`.

fields.title: ServerAddress
fields.description: The server address, which may be the IP address, hostname, or URL. Use when `FilterType` is `Plugin`.

fields.title: Username
fields.description: The user name for the service. Use when `FilterType` is `Plugin`.

fields.title: Password
fields.description: The password for the service. Use when `FilterType` is `Plugin`.

fields.title: Certificate UUID
fields.description: The UUID of the certificate payload within the same profile that the system uses to authenticate the user. Use when `FilterType` is `Plugin`.

fields.title: Organization
fields.description: The organization string to pass to the third-party plug-in. Use when `FilterType` is `Plugin`.

fields.title: VendorConfig
fields.description: The custom dictionary that the filtering service plug-in needs. Use when `FilterType` is `Plugin`.

fields.title: FilterBrowsers
fields.description:
If `true`, the system enables filtering WebKit traffic. Use when `FilterType` is `Plugin`.

> Note:
> At least one of `FilterBrowsers` or `FilterSockets` needs to be `true`.

fields.title: FilterSockets
fields.description:
If `true`, enables the filtering of socket traffic. Use when `FilterType` is `Plugin`.

> Note:
> At least one of `FilterBrowsers` or `FilterSockets` needs to be `true`.

fields.title: Filter Data Provider Designated Requirement
fields.description: The designated requirement string that the system embeds in the code signature of the filter data provider system extension. This string identifies the filter data provider when the filter starts running. Required if `FilterSockets` is `true`.

fields.title: Filter Data Provider Bundle Identifier
fields.description: The bundle identifier string of the filter data provider system extension. This string identifies the filter data provider when the filter starts running. Required if `FilterSockets` is `true`.

fields.title: Filter Network Packets
fields.description:
If `true` and `FilterType` is `Plugin`, the system enables filtering network packets. Use when `FilterType` is `Plugin`.

> Note:
> At least one of `FilterPackets` or `FilterSockets` needs to be `true`.

fields.title: Filter Packet Provider Designated Requirement
fields.description: The designated requirement string that the system embeds in the code signature of the filter packet provider system extension. This string identifies the filter packet provider when the filter starts running. Required if `FilterPackets` is `true`.

fields.title: Filter Packet Provider Bundle Identifier
fields.description: The bundle identifier string of the filter packet provider system extension. This string identifies the filter packet provider when the filter starts running. Required if `FilterPackets` is `true`.

fields.title: Filter Grade
fields.description: The system uses this value to derive the relative order of content filters. Filters with a grade of `firewall` see network traffic before filters with a grade of `inspector`. However, the system doesn't define the order of filters within a grade.

fields.title: Content Filter UUID
fields.description: A globally unique identifier for this content filter configuration. The content filter processes network traffic for managed apps with the same `ContentFilterUUID` in their app attributes. Use when `FilterType` is `Plugin`.This key must be present for unsupervised devices and user enrollment.

fields.title: FilterURLs
fields.description: If `true`, the system filters URL requests. Use when `FilterType` is `Plugin`. Available in iOS 26 and macOS 26, and later.

fields.title: URLFilterParameters
fields.description: A dictionary containing URL filter parameters. Required when `FilterURLs` is `true`. Available in iOS 26 and macOS 26 and later.

entries.title: Wi-Fi
entries.description: The payload that configures Wi-Fi settings.

fields.title: Auto Join
fields.description:
If `true`, the device joins the network automatically.

If `false`, the user must tap the network name to join it.

fields.title: SSID
fields.description: The SSID of the Wi-Fi network to use. In iOS 7.0 and later, the SSID is optional if a value exists for `DomainName` value.

fields.title: Hidden
fields.description: If `true`, defines this network as hidden.

fields.title: Proxy Type
fields.description: The proxy type, if any, to use. If you choose the manual proxy type, you need the proxy server address, including its port and optionally a user name and password into the proxy server. If you choose the auto proxy type, you can enter a proxy autoconfiguration (PAC) URL.

fields.title: Encryption Type
fields.description:
The encryption type for the network.

If set to anything except `None`, the payload may contain the following three keys: `Password`, `PayloadCertificateUUID`, or `EAPClientConfiguration`.

As of iOS 16, tvOS 16, watchOS 9, and macOS 13:

- `WPA` allows joining WPA or WPA2 networks
- `WPA2` allows joining WPA2 or WPA3 networks
- `WPA3` allows joining WPA3 networks only
- `Any` allows joining WPA, WPA2, WPA3, and WEP networks

Prior to iOS 16, tvOS 16, and watchOS 9, specifying `WPA`, `WPA2`, and `WPA3` were equivalent and would allow joining any WPA network.

Prior to macOS 13, the encryption type, if specified explicitly, needed to match the encryption type of the network exactly.

fields.title: Password
fields.description: The password for the access point.

fields.title: Certificate UUID
fields.description: The UUID of the certificate payload within the same profile to use for the client credential.

fields.title: EAP Client Configuration
fields.description: The enterprise network configuration.

fields.title: Displayed Operator Name
fields.description: The operator name to display when connected to this network. Used only with Wi-Fi Hotspot 2.0 access points.

fields.title: Domain Name
fields.description: The primary domain of the tunnel.

fields.title: Roaming OIs
fields.description: An array of Roaming Consortium Organization Identifiers used for Wi-Fi Hotspot 2.0 negotiation.

fields.title: Roaming Enable
fields.description: If `true`, allows connection to roaming service providers.

fields.title: Is Hotspot
fields.description: If `true`, the device treats the network as a hotspot.

fields.title: HESSID
fields.description: The HESSID used for Wi-Fi Hotspot 2.0 negotiation.

fields.title: Realm Names
